name: epistole
description: Read, search, send, and manage email via IMAP and SMTP. Works with any provider (Migadu, Fastmail, Gmail app passwords, etc.).
long_description: Epistole connects Claude to your email account over standard IMAP (port 993, TLS) and SMTP (port 465, SSL) protocols. It supports reading your inbox, searching messages, viewing full message content, sending new emails, replying to threads, listing folders, marking messages read/unread, and moving messages between folders. All credentials are stored securely in the OS keychain via Claude Desktop's user_config system.

full_name.title: Full Name
full_name.description: Your name as it should appear in sent emails

username.title: Username
username.description: Email account username (usually same as email address)

password.title: Password
password.description: Email account password or app-specific password

tools.name: read_inbox
tools.description: List recent messages from inbox or any folder

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Search messages using IMAP search criteria

tools.name: get_message
tools.description: Get full content of a specific message by UID

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Compose and send a new email

tools.name: reply_to_message
tools.description: Reply to an existing email message

tools.name: move_message
tools.description: Move a message to a different folder
